parameters.subject: =Roadshow Confirmed: {{ $json.brandName }} - Logistics & Shipping Instructions
parameters.message:
=

Roadshow Confirmed - Ship Your Product

Brand: {{ $json.brandName }}

Event Date: {{ $json.eventDate }} to {{ $json.eventEndDate }}

Location: {{ $json.retailerLocation }}

Show Length: {{ $json.showLength }}

Shipping Instructions

  • Ship By: {{ $json.shippingDeadline }} (7 days before event)
  • Quantity: Demo units + sellable inventory per agreed plan
  • Include: Product spec sheets, marketing materials, pricing signs

Staffing

{{ $json.staffingNeeds }}

Staff must be trained on Sam's Club In-Club Standards (setup during approved hours, clean display, compliant behavior, tear-down within window).

Pre-Event Checklist

  • Complete pre-event club communication call
  • Confirm power drop requirements (if needed)
  • Verify display meets Sam's Club visual standards

meta.description: Stage 6 - Logistics & Field Readiness. Creates calendar events, builds logistics plan, sends shipping instructions. Triggered when retailer approves the program.
